title: ceratostylis humilis
intro: Ceratostylis humilis, also known as the Dwarf Ceratostylis, is a small, terrestrial orchid species native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis humilis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
